package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_manual_index_loop_without_bounds_need: Layer: Collection iteration. Flag manual index loops over slices where range would avoid repeated bounds-sensitive indexing.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule516PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario516Positive(records []Rule516PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
